metadata.description: Multi-Model Agent Teams for Claude Code. Orchestrate 10 AI CLIs (Kimi / GLM / Doubao / Qwen / MiniMax / MiMo / StepFun / Codex / Gemini / Claude) via Google A2A v0.3 HTTP protocol and MCP bridge. Supports fanout consensus, write→review→synth pipelines, cross-host teammates, and per-family -team sidecars.

plugins.name: mmteam
plugins.description: Multi-model agent teams — A2A HTTP daemons + MCP bridge + 13 slash commands for orchestrating 10 CLI backends.
